Before I proceed I need two quick confirmations:

1) Do you want me to reschedule this event (ID 5 / "Dentist Appointment") to start 2024-05-20 at 10:00 AM and keep the same duration (so it will end at 11:00 AM)? Or did you mean a different event titled exactly "Dental check-up"?

2) I need the clinic's email address to notify them. The event currently only includes your email, so please provide the clinic's email (e.g., frontdesk@clinic.com). If you want, I can add that email as a participant and then reschedule (both you and the clinic will be emailed the change).
